productDisplayName: Rockport Men LLandro Red Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this Llandro casual shoe from rockport is inspired by Formula One racing and makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperLeather upper with perforations on the sides of the forefoot for breathable comfortLacing system with a velcro strap on the midfoot for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a fabric inner for a snug, customised fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with  brand logo styled grooves for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
